StmtSimple.StatementText:
SELECT u.name AS [Name], u.principal_id AS [ID], CAST(CASE WHEN u.principal_id < 5 OR (u.principal_id >= 16384 and u.principal_id < 16400) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS bit) AS [IsSystemObject], CASE WHEN N'U' = u.type THEN 0 WHEN N'G' = u.type THEN 1 WHEN N'S' = u.type THEN 2 WHEN N'C' = u.type THEN 3 WHEN N'K' = u.type THEN 4 WHEN N'E' = u.type THEN 5 WHEN N'X' = u.type THEN 6 END AS [LoginType], CAST(CASE dp.state WHEN N'G' THEN 1 WHEN 'W' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS bit) AS [HasDBAccess], u.sid AS [Sid], u.create_date AS [CreateDate], u.modify_date AS [DateLastModified], ISNULL(u.default_schema_name,N'') AS [DefaultSchema], ISNULL(ak.name,N'') AS [AsymmetricKey], ISNULL(cert.name,N'') AS [Certificate], ISNULL(suser_sname(u.sid),N'') AS [Login], ISNULL(u.default_language_lcid, -1) AS [DefaultLanguageLcid], ISNULL(u.default_language_name,N'') AS [DefaultLanguageName], u.authentication_type AS [AuthenticationType],
CASE WHEN N'C' = u.type THEN 1 WHEN N'K' = u.type THEN 2 WHEN N'S' = u.type AND SUSER_SNAME(u.sid) is null AND u.authentication_type != 2 THEN 3 WHEN N'E' = u.type or N'X' = u.type THEN 4 ELSE 0 END AS [UserType] FROM sys.database_principals AS u LEFT OUTER JOIN sys.database_permissions AS dp ON dp.grantee_principal_id = u.principal_id and dp.type = @_msparam_0 LEFT OUTER JOIN sys.asymmetric_keys AS ak ON ak.sid = u.sid LEFT OUTER JOIN sys.certificates AS cert ON cert.sid = u.sid WHERE (u.type in ('U', 'S', 'G', 'C', 'K' ,'E', 'X'))and(u.name=@_msparam_1)

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: CONVERT(bit,CASE WHEN CONVERT_IMPLICIT(nchar(1),[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysprivs].[state] as [p].[state],0)=N'G' THEN (1) ELSE CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysprivs].[state] as [p].[state]='W' THEN (1) ELSE (0) END END,0)

CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='S' AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[id]=(2) THEN (0) ELSE CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='S' AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[password] IS NULL AND CONVERT(binary(9),[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[sid],0)<>0x010500000000000903 THEN (1) ELSE CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='S' AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[password] IS NOT NULL THEN (2) ELSE CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='U' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='G' THEN (3) ELSE CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='E' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='X' THEN (4) ELSE (0) END END END END END

CONVERT(bit,CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[id]<(5) OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[id]>=(16384) AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[id]<(16400) THEN (1) ELSE (0) END,0)

CASE WHEN N'U'=CONVERT_IMPLICIT(nchar(1),[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type],0) THEN (0) ELSE CASE WHEN N'G'=CONVERT_IMPLICIT(nchar(1),[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type],0) THEN (1) ELSE CASE WHEN N'S'=CONVERT_IMPLICIT(nchar(1),[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type],0) THEN (2) ELSE CASE WHEN N'C'=CONVERT_IMPLICIT(nchar(1),[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type],0) THEN (3) ELSE CASE WHEN N'K'=CONVERT_IMPLICIT(nchar(1),[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type],0) THEN (4) ELSE CASE WHEN N'E'=CONVERT_IMPLICIT(nchar(1),[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type],0) THEN (5) ELSE CASE WHEN N'X'=CONVERT_IMPLICIT(nchar(1),[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type],0) THEN (6) ELSE NULL END END END END END END END

CASE WHEN N'C'=CONVERT_IMPLICIT(nchar(1),[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type],0) THEN (1) ELSE CASE WHEN N'K'=CONVERT_IMPLICIT(nchar(1),[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type],0) THEN (2) ELSE CASE WHEN N'S'=CONVERT_IMPLICIT(nchar(1),[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type],0) AND suser_sname([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[sid]) IS NULL AND CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='S' AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[id]=(2) THEN (0) ELSE CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='S' AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[password] IS NULL AND CONVERT(binary(9),[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[sid],0)<>0x010500000000000903 THEN (1) ELSE CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='S' AND [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[password] IS NOT NULL THEN (2) ELSE CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='U' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='G' THEN (3) ELSE CASE WHEN [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='E' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='X' THEN (4) ELSE (0) END END END END END<>(2) THEN (3) ELSE CASE WHEN N'E'=CONVERT_IMPLICIT(nchar(1),[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type],0) OR N'X'=CONVERT_IMPLICIT(nchar(1),[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type],0) THEN (4) ELSE (0) END END END END

[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='C' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='E' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='G' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='K' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='S' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='U' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysowners].[type]='X'

CONVERT_IMPLICIT(nchar(4),[T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysprivs].[type] as [p].[type],0)=CONVERT_IMPLICIT(nvarchar(4000),[@_msparam_0],0) AND ([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysprivs].[state] as [p].[state]<>'R' OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysprivs].[subid] as [p].[subid]<>(0)) AND ([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysprivs].[class] as [p].[class]<(101) OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysprivs].[class] as [p].[class]>(101)) AND ([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysprivs].[class] as [p].[class]<(105) OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysprivs].[class] as [p].[class]>(105)) AND ([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysprivs].[class] as [p].[class]<(108) OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysprivs].[class] as [p].[class]>(108)) AND ([T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysprivs].[class] as [p].[class]<(109) OR [T-SCS-Admittance].[sys].[sysprivs].[class] as [p].[class]>(109))
